# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Blob Storage to store application logs and backups. Configure for standard performance tier with default access settings. Skip lifecycle management policies for now to keep the template simple. This is for our logging infrastructure.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

resources:
  type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
  name: mystorageaccount
  apiVersion: '2019-06-01'
  location: East US
  sku:
    name: Standard_LRS
    tier: Standard
  kind: StorageV2

  resources:
    - type: blobServices
      name: default
      properties:
        cors:
          corsRules:
            - allowedOrigins:
                - '*'
              allowedMethods:
                - GET
                - POST
                - PUT
                - OPTIONS
              maxAgeInSeconds: 3600

      resources:
        - type: containers
          name: logs
          properties:
            publicAccess: None

        - type: containers
          name: backups
          properties:
            publicAccess: None
